title: Improve gated clock support in hierarhical verilation

features.name: gated clock assignment inside hierarchical block
features.description: Code should include a gated clock assignment where the gated clock is created by ORing a clock signal with a gate control signal inside a hierarchical block module

features.name: hierarchical block instantiation with clock signal
features.description: Code should include a sub-module instantiation where a clock signal is passed to the sub-module, with the sub-module marked as a hierarchical block

features.name: gated clock usage in always_ff sequential block
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that uses a gated clock signal in its posedge sensitivity list for sequential logic
